sizing_rule.note: Ralph Vince multi-market optimal f sizing: U = Σ(optimal f$ per market) / (Σ(initial margin per market) × N). Determines upside utilization limit across N simultaneous markets by summing individual optimal f dollar amounts and normalizing by aggregate margin requirements.

source_rule_text: Position sizing across multiple markets using the sum of optimal f dollar amounts divided by total initial margin requirements times number of markets to determine upside utilization limit.
